title: Alternative Education * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Alternative Education * Native American Community 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COLUMBIA GORGE EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT TITLE VI/JOM INDIAN EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides supplemental educational and supportive services to eligible students. The program assists in connecting families of Native American students with culture, community, and education to successfully complete high school and pursue higher education. 400 E Scenic Drive Suite 207 The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: The student must be enrolled in school in Wasco or Hood River County. Either the student or a biological parent or grandparent must be or must have been enrolled in or recognized by an Indian tribe, group, or band Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3:30pm (541) 506-2258 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER MANY NATIONS ACADEMY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a hands-on, culturally relevant, student-centered learning environment that blends high school and post-secondary curriculum. Participants can earn a high school diploma. Academic programming integrates local Native culture, family and community outreach, and partnerships with Portland Community College and other post-secondary institutions. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Grades 9-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 972-2461 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COLUMBIA GORGE EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT TITLE VI/JOM INDIAN EDUCATION NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER MANY NATIONS ACADEMY
